criteria_verification.evidence: Created tests/unit/test_cli.py containing class TestCliParser (18 test methods) and class TestCliOutput (16 test methods). File verified to exist and compile cleanly.
criteria_verification.notes: Created tests/unit/test_cli.py containing class TestCliParser (18 test methods) and class TestCliOutput (16 test methods). File verified to exist and compile cleanly.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Parser tests cover all 6 subcommands: ping, video-info, get-transcript, list-transcripts, extract-insights, list-focus-areas
criteria_verification.evidence: TestCliParser contains test_ping_subcommand, test_video_info_subcommand, test_get_transcript_subcommand, test_list_transcripts_subcommand, test_extract_insights_subcommand, and test_list_focus_areas_subcommand. All 6 verify args.command matches the expected subcommand name.
criteria_verification.notes: TestCliParser contains test_ping_subcommand, test_video_info_subcommand, test_get_transcript_subcommand, test_list_transcripts_subcommand, test_extract_insights_subcommand, and test_list_focus_areas_subcommand. All 6 verify args.command matches the expected subcommand name.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Parser tests verify default values (language=en, no_segments=False, focus_areas=general, max_insights=10)
criteria_verification.evidence: TestCliParser contains test_get_transcript_default_language (asserts language=='en'), test_get_transcript_default_no_segments (asserts no_segments is False), test_extract_insights_default_focus_areas (asserts focus_areas=='general'), and test_extract_insights_default_max_insights (asserts max_insights==10).
criteria_verification.notes: TestCliParser contains test_get_transcript_default_language (asserts language=='en'), test_get_transcript_default_no_segments (asserts no_segments is False), test_extract_insights_default_focus_areas (asserts focus_areas=='general'), and test_extract_insights_default_max_insights (asserts max_insights==10).

criteria_verification.evidence: TestCliParser contains test_language_flag (--language fr), test_no_segments_flag (--no-segments), test_focus_flag (--focus youtube-channel), test_focus_flag_multiple_comma_separated (--focus entrepreneurial,investment), test_video_id_flag (--video-id dQw4w9WgXcQ), test_video_id_flag_default_empty, test_max_insights_flag (--max-insights 5), and test_max_insights_flag_is_int (verifies int type).
criteria_verification.notes: TestCliParser contains test_language_flag (--language fr), test_no_segments_flag (--no-segments), test_focus_flag (--focus youtube-channel), test_focus_flag_multiple_comma_separated (--focus entrepreneurial,investment), test_video_id_flag (--video-id dQw4w9WgXcQ), test_video_id_flag_default_empty, test_max_insights_flag (--max-insights 5), and test_max_insights_flag_is_int (verifies int type).

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Output tests verify `ping` returns valid JSON with `status=healthy` and `mode=cli`
criteria_verification.evidence: TestCliOutput contains test_ping_returns_valid_json (json.loads on stdout), test_ping_status_healthy (asserts data['status']=='healthy'), test_ping_mode_cli (asserts data['mode']=='cli'), test_ping_exit_code_zero, and test_ping_includes_server_metadata.
criteria_verification.notes: TestCliOutput contains test_ping_returns_valid_json (json.loads on stdout), test_ping_status_healthy (asserts data['status']=='healthy'), test_ping_mode_cli (asserts data['mode']=='cli'), test_ping_exit_code_zero, and test_ping_includes_server_metadata.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Output tests verify error results produce exit code 1
criteria_verification.evidence: TestCliOutput contains test_error_result_produces_exit_code_1 (video-info with invalid URL asserts exit_code==1 and 'error' in data), test_error_result_has_error_structure (verifies error dict has code and message), test_get_transcript_invalid_url_exit_code_1, and test_list_transcripts_invalid_url_exit_code_1.
criteria_verification.notes: TestCliOutput contains test_error_result_produces_exit_code_1 (video-info with invalid URL asserts exit_code==1 and 'error' in data), test_error_result_has_error_structure (verifies error dict has code and message), test_get_transcript_invalid_url_exit_code_1, and test_list_transcripts_invalid_url_exit_code_1.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Output tests verify `list-focus-areas` returns all presets
criteria_verification.evidence: TestCliOutput contains test_list_focus_areas_returns_all_presets (checks all 6 preset names: general, entrepreneurial, investment, technical, youtube-channel, ai-learning are present in data['focus_areas']), test_list_focus_areas_returns_valid_json (checks focus_areas, category_definitions, usage_tip keys), test_list_focus_areas_presets_contain_categories (verifies each preset has a non-empty category list), and test_list_focus_areas_exit_code_zero.
criteria_verification.notes: TestCliOutput contains test_list_focus_areas_returns_all_presets (checks all 6 preset names: general, entrepreneurial, investment, technical, youtube-channel, ai-learning are present in data['focus_areas']), test_list_focus_areas_returns_valid_json (checks focus_areas, category_definitions, usage_tip keys), test_list_focus_areas_presets_contain_categories (verifies each preset has a non-empty category list), and test_list_focus_areas_exit_code_zero.
